steps.t: The Galtrev Lumber-camp is not far to the north of Galtrev. Wood is needed from the Galtrev Lumber-camp, but the threat of Dragon-clan thieves have ma…
Fraid is near the overturned waggon on the outskirts of the Galtrev Lumber-camp. You should bring the wood you gathered to Fraid.
The wood you collected is in a pile near the overturned waggon. You have recovered some wood and should now carry it to Galtrev.
Macsen is in Galtrev. You should speak with Macsen to complete your daily delivery of the wood shipment from the Galtrev Lumber-camp.
